company_description: Professional laboratory glassware manufacturer providing high-quality scientific equipment
hero_tagline_secondary: Over 30 years of expertise in high-quality scientific glassware design and manufacturing
usp_b2b_description: Bulk ordering and custom solutions for laboratories and research institutions
usp_b2c_description: Small quantity purchasing services for individual researchers and educational needs
partnership_b2b_description: Bulk orders, custom specifications, dedicated quotation services
story_content:
Founded in 1970 by Mr. Jin-Ho Hsieh, Guang Ming Glass Instrument Co. specialized in the production of glass hydrometers and thermometers, becoming one of the few professional manufacturers in the domestic market. A retail channel, “Shin Kong Instruments,” was established concurrently to distribute a wide range of instruments.
In 1990, the company was restructured as Chiao Hsin Co., Ltd. and expanded its manufacturing operations into China, strengthening its production capacity and service capabilities. In 2011, the company further diversified into kitchen and tabletop glassware.
With over 50 years of experience, Chiao Hsin remains committed to quality, continuous improvement, and reliable service, offering both manufacturing and sourcing solutions for a wide range of glass products.
milestone_1970_desc:
Founded Guang Ming Glass Instrument Co.; began production of glass hydrometers and thermometers.
Launched “Shin Kong Instruments” as a retail distribution channel.
milestone_1990_desc: Reorganized as NEW GLATEC Co., Ltd.; expanded production to China.
milestone_2011_desc: Expanded into kitchen and tabletop glassware.
milestone_present_desc: Ongoing growth in manufacturing, quality, and sourcing capabilities.
